altText: A mayapple plant with big leaves like green umbrellas and white flowers underneath.
Many mayapple plants standing like little green umbrellas on the forest floor.
A patch of mayapple plants with big umbrella shaped leaves.
A big round mayapple leaf that looks like a green umbrella.
A white mayapple flower hiding under the big umbrella leaf.
A close look at a white mayapple flower with a yellow middle.
A white mayapple flower seen from the side under the leaves.
Small green mayapple fruits shaped like little apples under the forked stem.
